data.title: ReconAfrica Provides Operational Update and Reports 2025 Year-End Results
data.description: In Calgary, Alberta on April 14, 2026, Reconnaissance Energy Africa Ltd., known as ReconAfrica, shared updates on their operations along with their financial and operational outcomes for 2025. The company, listed as TSXV: RECO, OTCQX: RECAF, Frankfurt: 0XD, NSX: REC, renewed its shelf prospectus and made all necessary filings accessible on SEDAR+ (sedarplus.ca).

data.title: Pacaso Adds Charles Street Residence to Its London Collection, Deepening Its Presence in Mayfair
data.description: In response to increasing buyer interest in shared ownership in London's coveted postal code, a prestigious residential property on a renowned Mayfair street has recently been acquired. This acquisition underscores the rising demand for co-ownership opportunities in the city's most exclusive area. The purchase was made by Pacaso, a prominent real estate platform specializing in tech-driven solutions for co-owned residences. The property's location on one of Mayfair's top residential streets highlights the allure of shared ownership in London's high-end real estate market. This development comes as more buyers seek to invest in co-ownership arrangements, reflecting a growing trend in the city's property sector. The address's prominence and the demand for such opportunities emphasize the appeal of co-ownership models in London.

data.title: Stellus Capital Investment Corporation Announces $0.34 Second Quarter 2026 Regular Dividend, Payable Monthly in Increments of $0.1133 in May, June, and July 2026
data.description: Stellus Capital Investment Corporation, a publicly traded company listed under the ticker symbol SCM on the New York Stock Exchange, recently disclosed that its Board of Directors has approved a monthly dividend of $0.1133 for the months of April, May, and June. This totals to $0.34 per share for the second quarter of the fiscal year.

data.title: Stellus Private Credit BDC Announces $0.34 Second Quarter 2026 Regular Dividend, Payable Monthly in Increments of $0.1133 in April, May, and June 2026
data.description: A Houston-based company, Stellus Private Credit BDC, declared a monthly dividend of $0.1133 for April, May, and June 2026. This amounts to $0.34 per share for the second quarter. The Board of Trustees made this announcement, ensuring regular dividends for shareholders over the upcoming months.

data.title: NE Bob Waltz Plumbing & Heating Celebrates 70 Years of Family-Owned Service to Frederick County
data.description: Celebrating its 70th anniversary, NE Bob Waltz Plumbing & Heating, Inc. has made a $70,000 investment in the Frederick community. Established in Frederick, Md., the family-owned company has been serving the area for seven decades. With a strong commitment to the community, the company marks this milestone by giving back through this significant financial contribution.

data.title: Prime Drink Group Announces Convertible Debenture, Board Appointment and Grant of Differed Share Units
data.description: On April 14, 2026, Prime Drink Group Corp. (CSE: PRME) disclosed a non-brokered private placement named the “Private Placement,” consisting of 10 to 16 Units priced at $250,000 per Unit. The initiative targets minimum and maximum gross profits of $2,500,000 and $4,000,000, respectively.
